name: bash-scripting
description: Expert guide for writing, hardening, debugging, and reviewing Bash and POSIX shell scripts: strict mode, defensive patterns, safe quoting and expansion, arrays, trap-based cleanup, getopts argument parsing, ShellCheck/shfmt linting, Bats testing, and Linux/macOS portability.

interface.shortDescription: Robust Bash and POSIX shell scripting guidance
interface.longDescription: Write, harden, debug, and review production-grade Bash and POSIX shell scripts with strict mode, defensive patterns, safe quoting, trap-based cleanup, ShellCheck/shfmt linting, Bats testing, and cross-platform portability checks.
defaultPrompt: Use Bash Scripting to write a robust, production-ready shell script for this task.
Use Bash Scripting to review and harden this shell script.
Use Bash Scripting to debug why this script fails.
